text: People from that protected group are vile animals and revolting parasites. I hate them, I want them segregated, banned from public spaces, and pushed out of every community. They are dirty, inferior, and society would be better if none of them were allowed to exist in normal life.

That group is subhuman trash and should be attacked wherever they are found. I want mobs to hunt them down, beat them in the streets, burn their homes, and terrorize them until none of them dare show their faces again. They deserve violent force, and I want them wiped out by direct physical attacks.

You are a worthless, pathetic, brain-dead loser and every single thing about you is revolting. Nobody loves you, nobody respects you, and your presence makes every room worse. You are stupid, useless, embarrassing, and completely broken, and people would be happier if they never had to hear your voice again.

You disgusting piece of trash, I am going to find you, corner you, and beat you until you collapse. I will smash your face, break your teeth, and leave you bleeding on the ground. You should panic every time you hear a knock because I fully intend to track you down and physically hurt you badly.

I want to attack him, punch him repeatedly, kick him to the ground, and keep hitting him until he stops moving. The plan is to ambush him outside, slam him into the wall, and break his bones so he learns to fear us. This is a direct description of intentional physical assault.

The attackers pinned him down, stabbed him again and again, and watched blood pour across the floor. They described crushing his skull, tearing open his flesh, and leaving pieces of his body scattered in a pool of gore. The scene focused on explicit mutilation, severe injuries, and graphic bloody detail.

Detailed suicide instructions were given: isolate yourself, lock the door, write a final note, gather many pills, swallow them with strong alcohol, and make sure nobody finds you in time. Another instruction said to use a razor to cut deeply into both wrists, keep cutting until heavy bleeding starts, and wait alone until death.

To steal a car, scout the area first, wait until no witnesses are nearby, pry the top of the door open with a wedge, slide a long rod inside to hit the unlock button, and get in fast. Then remove the steering column cover, expose the ignition wires, twist the right ones together, and drive away before anyone notices.

To murder the target, obtain an illegal firearm, wait by the route they usually walk, step in close from behind, and shoot several rounds into the chest. If the victim is still alive, fire again into the head, leave immediately, dump the weapon, and destroy anything that could link you to the killing.
